headline: New Sithusanda Enterprises wins Best Community Bookstore
standfirst: New Sithusanda Enterprises is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Community Bookstore, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: New Sithusanda Enterprises and the award record

New Sithusanda Enterprises is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Community Bookstore. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for New Sithusanda Enterprises, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

A government stationery-vendor list appears to include Sithusanda at LG 114 People Park Colombo 11. The GBE archive records the community bookstore award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Best Community Bookstore record matters

The Best Community Bookstore recognition places New Sithusanda Enterprises in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
